case_title: B. K. VS. LYFT, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR APPROVAL OF COMPLEX LITIGATION DESIGNATION (TRANSACTION ID # 210066965) FILED BY PLAINTIFF K., B. , AN INDIVIDUAL
INITIAL CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-07-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. PER ORDER FILED MAY-6-2024, THIS CASE HAS BEEN ADDED TO JUDICIAL COUNCIL COORDINATION PROCEEDING NO. 5061, THE LYFT RIDESHARE CASES.

MASS TORT, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210066965) GENERAL NEGLIGENCE; NEGLIGENT HIRING, RETENTION, AND SUPERVISION; COMMON CARRIER NEGLIGENCE; NEGLIGENT FAILURE TO WARN; VICARIOUS LIABILITY/LIABILITY FOR THE TORTS OF LYFT'S DRIVERS; VICARIOUS LIABILITY FOR SEXUAL ASSUALT; VICARIOUS LIABILITY FOR SEXUAL BATTERY; INTENTIONAL MISREPRESENTATION; NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION; NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS; BREACH OF CONTRACT; STRICT PRODUCT LIABILITY-DESIGN DEFECT; STRICT PRODUCT LIABILITY-FAILURE TO WARN FILED BY PLAINTIFF K., B. , AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION DOES 1 THROUGH 50, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-14-2024 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE

DECLARATION OF SARAH R. LONDON IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION TO DESIGNATE CASE AS COMPLEX PURSUANT TO CAL. RULES OF COURT RULE 3.400 (TRANSACTION ID # 210066965) FILED BY PLAINTIFF K., B. , AN INDIVIDUAL
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 72578229): ABRAMS, RACHEL SUBSTITUTED FOR LONDON, SARAH R. AS ATTORNEY FOR K., B. , AN INDIVIDUAL

ORDER GRANTING COMPLEX DESIGNATION AND FOR SINGLE ASSIGNMENT TO JUDGE ANDREW Y.S. CHENG FOR ALL PURPOSES. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-07-2024 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 613. AUG-14-2024 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IN DEPT. 610 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
